title: calophyllum piluliferum
intro: Calophyllum piluliferum, also known as the Pilu tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of the Calophyllum piluliferum plant are attributed to its oil, which contains a high concentration of calophyllic acid, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the Calophyllum piluliferum include its use in treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The herbal preparation of the Calophyllum piluliferum plant typically involves extracting its oil, which can be used topically or added to skincare products to harness its medicinal properties.
